positive: A majestic, stylized bioluminescent forest scene viewed at twilight, featuring stylized silhouettes of diverse flora and whimsical woodland creatures. The central focus is a glowing crystalline waterfall cascading into a serene pool. Use a high-contrast, minimalist watercolor and ink style, emphasizing clean, graphic shapes and deep jewel tones (indigo, teal, emerald, violet). The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, designed to look perfect on fabric. Strong backlighting from the glowing elements should create dramatic, clean edges and silhouettes. Intricate yet clean lines, vaporwave aesthetic meets folklore.
negative: photorealistic, photo, blurry, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, artifact, noise, bokeh, noise, messy, clutter, messy background, complex, poor composition
